# RicochetHex

> Strategic hexagonal chess-style game with ricochet, neutralization, and capture mechanics. Play locally, against AI opponents, or online with friends.

RicochetHex is a browser-based strategy game played on a hexagonal board. Pawns move and capture using ricochet mechanics inspired by classic chess. Modes include local hot-seat play, single-player vs AI (multiple difficulty levels), AI vs AI spectator mode, and real-time online multiplayer rooms.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Main game — choose a mode and play.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account login and signup for online multiplayer.
- [Multiplayer Lobby](/lobby): Create or join an online game room.

- [robots.txt](/robots.txt)
